title: crates.io publication readiness for grove-core + grove
description: Add required publish metadata (description, license, repository, readme, keywords, categories) to core/Cargo.toml and cli/Cargo.toml. Make grove depend on grove-core by version (path + version so the published CLI resolves the published lib). cargo publish --dry-run -p grove-core and -p grove must both succeed. Confirm crate-name availability/ownership on crates.io for grove and grove-core; if taken, surface a fallback owned/namespaced name for a decision before publishing. This is the final gate.
